name: taiwan-market-signal
description: Taiwan stock health and pullback-risk signal dashboard.

scripts.check:json: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package.json','tsconfig.json','data/seeds/markets.seed.json','data/seeds/stocks.seed.json','data/source-gates/narrow-approval-outcomes.json','data/source-gates/runner-approval-decision-outcomes.json','data/source-gates/blocker-review-decision-outcomes.json','data/source-gates/tw-equity-provider-specific-terms-review-outcomes.json','data/source-gates/tw-equity-schema-exposure-repair-outcomes.json','data/source-gates/tw-equity-staging-migration-apply-outcomes.json']) { JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log(f+' ok'); }"
scripts.check:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('.env.example','utf8'); for (const k of ['NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL','NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY','SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY','NEXT_PUBLIC_DATA_SOURCE','MARKET_SIGNAL_SUPABASE_READS','DATA_FRESHNESS_SOURCE','DATA_FRESHNESS_SUPABASE_READS','INTERNAL_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED','INTERNAL_DIAGNOSTICS_TOKEN','NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL']) { if (!s.includes(k+'=')) throw new Error('Missing '+k); console.log(k+' ok'); }"
